nasb.text: He has cast the lot for them, And His hand has divided it to them by line. They shall possess it forever; From generation to generation they will dwell in it.

esv.text: He has cast the lot for them; his hand has portioned it out to them with the line; they shall possess it forever; from generation to generation they shall dwell in it.

cnv.text: 他也為牠們抽籤， 他的手用準繩給牠們分地； 牠們必永遠得著那地， 也要世世代代住在其中。

ccb.text: 祂亲手为它们抽签， 用准绳为它们分地。 它们必永远占据那里， 世世代代住在那里。

csbs.text: 他也为它们抽签， 亲手用准绳给它们分地； 它们必占有那地，直到永远， 世世代代住在其中。
